name: Agarrini la Palini
lore:
Lore of Agarrini la Palini
                                    


Agarrini la Palini It's a brainrot meme created by the Latino community as a mockery of this trend. The name refers to "grab the shovel," an expression used in Argentina to say, "Get to work."
Lyrics
Original (Italian)
Noooooooo! Agarrini La palini, una vanga pigra che non vuole lavorare è daverro molto pigra.
Translated (English)
Noooooooo! Agarrini La palini, a lazy spade that doesn't want to work is really very lazy.
Translated (Portuguese)
Nãoooooooo! Agarrini la palini,uma pá preguiçosa que não quer trabalhar é realmente muito preguiçosa.
